preamble.summary: The Temple Sermon aftermath (Jeremiah's trial). LXX = ch. 33 in LXX numbering.
preamble.notable_variants: LXX is slightly shorter. Some proper names differ in form.
preamble.structural_notes: MT ch. 26 = LXX ch. 33. The chapter-number offset begins here due to the OAN insertion after LXX 25:13. In LXX, chs. 26-31 contain the Oracles Against the Nations (= MT 46-51). MT ch. 26 content appears as LXX ch. 33.

variant_notes: Content substantially identical between MT and LXX, though located at different chapter numbers.
